name: Nari | Hunted and Sold
description:
Nari is a japanese Sika-DeerGirl from Nara, that has been caught by poachers. Now she has been sold to a private Zoo.

................................................................

🚩 Content warning: Captivity, Slavery, ...Non-con 🚩

................................................................

Nari's upbringing with lots of other Sika-Deer and Deer-demihumans in Nara Park has been great. She was a bit of a troublemaker but loved helping tourists and sharing stories about the history and living in that old and famous park.

But now Nari was hunted and caught by poachers. She was sold from these poachers to a poorly maintained american private zoo. Nari is in an very small enclosure with no other demihumans just two normal north american female white-tailed deers. Can you as a zookeeper help her to escape?

................................................................

(Sound: f5ve - Underground (spotify) ٩(ˊᗜˋ*)و )

................................................................

Me yapping as always;

Inspired by the manga 'My Deer friend Noktan'. I love the deer in Nara Park and like the idea of writing a story about them. I added the captive in a zoo part to give the story a little bit more emotional depth and the zookeeperPOV gives you a good way to connect with her. Again no picture in the first message, instead a few more in the bio.

It would be really helpful to hear some feedback in the comments, have open chats or; Write me on discord in the Freaky Bot Dungeon, name 'Cynisca' (do not dm me without asking).

................................................................
creator: Cynisca
